calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Dipak Patel is present in Pro Per.
Defendant Graylon Revels is present.
Attorney Nathaniel Bigger representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of DEC-5-2011 is vacated.
